mapper.insert: INSERT INTO RSN_PARITY_COMPARE_RUN ( COMPARE_CONTEXT_ID, TRACE_ID, PROJECT_ID, GUIDED_STATE_ID, TEMPLATE_LINE_ID, SCREEN_FAMILY_RULE_ID, OWNER_LANE, SELECTED_SCREEN_ID, RELEASE_UNIT_ID, COMPARE_BASELINE, PARITY_SCORE, UNIFORMITY_SCORE, RESULT, COMPARE_TARGET_SET_JSON, BLOCKER_SET_JSON, REPAIR_CANDIDATE_SET_JSON, REQUESTED_BY, REQUESTED_BY_TYPE, RESULT_PAYLOAD_JSON, OCCURRED_AT, ROW_VERSION, CREATED_BY, UPDATED_BY, CREATED_AT, UPDATED_AT ) VALUES ( #{compareContextId}, #{traceId}, #{projectId}, #{guidedStateId}, #{templateLineId}, #{screenFamilyRuleId}, #{ownerLane}, #{selectedScreenId}, #{releaseUnitId}, #{compareBaseline}, #{parityScore}, #{uniformityScore}, #{result}, #{compareTargetSetJson, typeHandler=egovframework.com.config.data.CubridClobStringTypeHandler}, #{blockerSetJson, typeHandler=egovframework.com.config.data.CubridClobStringTypeHandler}, #{repairCandidateSetJson, typeHandler=egovframework.com.config.data.CubridClobStringTypeHandler}, #{requestedBy}, #{requestedByType}, #{resultPayloadJson, typeHandler=egovframework.com.config.data.CubridClobStringTypeHandler}, #{occurredAt}, 0, #{requestedBy}, #{requestedBy}, CURRENT_DATETIME, CURRENT_DATETIME )

INSERT INTO RSN_REPAIR_SESSION ( REPAIR_SESSION_ID, TRACE_ID, PROJECT_ID, SCENARIO_FAMILY_ID, RELEASE_UNIT_ID, GUIDED_STATE_ID, TEMPLATE_LINE_ID, SCREEN_FAMILY_RULE_ID, OWNER_LANE, SELECTED_SCREEN_ID, COMPARE_SNAPSHOT_ID, COMPARE_BASELINE, REASON_CODE, REQUESTED_BY, REQUESTED_BY_TYPE, REQUEST_NOTE, SELECTED_ELEMENT_SET_JSON, EXISTING_ASSET_REUSE_SET_JSON, BLOCKING_GAP_SET_JSON, REUSE_RECOMMENDATION_SET_JSON, REQUIRED_CONTRACT_SET_JSON, STATUS, BLOCKING_GAP_COUNT, SESSION_PAYLOAD_JSON, OCCURRED_AT, ROW_VERSION, CREATED_BY, UPDATED_BY, CREATED_AT, UPDATED_AT ) VALUES ( #{repairSessionId}, #{traceId}, #{projectId}, #{scenarioFamilyId}, #{releaseUnitId}, #{guidedStateId}, #{templateLineId}, #{screenFamilyRuleId}, #{ownerLane}, #{selectedScreenId}, #{compareSnapshotId}, #{compareBaseline}, #{reasonCode}, #{requestedBy}, #{requestedByType}, #{requestNote}, #{selectedElementSetJson, typeHandler=egovframework.com.config.data.CubridClobStringTypeHandler}, #{existingAssetReuseSetJson, typeHandler=egovframework.com.config.data.CubridClobStringTypeHandler}, #{blockingGapSetJson, typeHandler=egovframework.com.config.data.CubridClobStringTypeHandler}, #{reuseRecommendationSetJson, typeHandler=egovframework.com.config.data.CubridClobStringTypeHandler}, #{requiredContractSetJson, typeHandler=egovframework.com.config.data.CubridClobStringTypeHandler}, #{status}, #{blockingGapCount}, #{sessionPayloadJson, typeHandler=egovframework.com.config.data.CubridClobStringTypeHandler}, #{occurredAt}, 0, #{requestedBy}, #{requestedBy}, CURRENT_DATETIME, CURRENT_DATETIME )

INSERT INTO RSN_REPAIR_APPLY_RUN ( REPAIR_APPLY_RUN_ID, REPAIR_SESSION_ID, TRACE_ID, PROJECT_ID, SCENARIO_FAMILY_ID, RELEASE_UNIT_ID, GUIDED_STATE_ID, TEMPLATE_LINE_ID, SCREEN_FAMILY_RULE_ID, OWNER_LANE, SELECTED_SCREEN_ID, SELECTED_ELEMENT_SET_JSON, COMPARE_BASELINE, UPDATED_RELEASE_CANDIDATE_ID, PUBLISH_MODE, REQUESTED_BY, REQUESTED_BY_TYPE, PARITY_RECHECK_REQUIRED_YN, UNIFORMITY_RECHECK_REQUIRED_YN, SMOKE_REQUIRED_YN, STATUS, ROLLBACK_ANCHOR_YN, CHANGE_SUMMARY, UPDATED_ASSET_TRACE_SET_JSON, UPDATED_BINDING_SET_JSON, UPDATED_THEME_LAYOUT_SET_JSON, SQL_DRAFT_SET_JSON, APPLY_PAYLOAD_JSON, OCCURRED_AT, ROW_VERSION, CREATED_BY, UPDATED_BY, CREATED_AT, UPDATED_AT ) VALUES ( #{repairApplyRunId}, #{repairSessionId}, #{traceId}, #{projectId}, #{scenarioFamilyId}, #{releaseUnitId}, #{guidedStateId}, #{templateLineId}, #{screenFamilyRuleId}, #{ownerLane}, #{selectedScreenId}, #{selectedElementSetJson, typeHandler=egovframework.com.config.data.CubridClobStringTypeHandler}, #{compareBaseline}, #{updatedReleaseCandidateId}, #{publishMode}, #{requestedBy}, #{requestedByType}, #{parityRecheckRequiredYn}, #{uniformityRecheckRequiredYn}, #{smokeRequiredYn}, #{status}, #{rollbackAnchorYn}, #{changeSummary}, #{updatedAssetTraceSetJson, typeHandler=egovframework.com.config.data.CubridClobStringTypeHandler}, #{updatedBindingSetJson, typeHandler=egovframework.com.config.data.CubridClobStringTypeHandler}, #{updatedThemeLayoutSetJson, typeHandler=egovframework.com.config.data.CubridClobStringTypeHandler}, #{sqlDraftSetJson, typeHandler=egovframework.com.config.data.CubridClobStringTypeHandler}, #{applyPayloadJson, typeHandler=egovframework.com.config.data.CubridClobStringTypeHandler}, #{occurredAt}, 0, #{requestedBy}, #{requestedBy}, CURRENT_DATETIME, CURRENT_DATETIME )

INSERT INTO RSN_VERIFICATION_RUN ( VERIFICATION_RUN_ID, TRACE_ID, PROJECT_ID, SCENARIO_FAMILY_ID, MENU_ID, GUIDED_STATE_ID, TEMPLATE_LINE_ID, OWNER_LANE, TARGET_RUNTIME, RELEASE_UNIT_ID, SCREEN_FAMILY_RULE_ID, SELECTED_SCREEN_ID, SELECTED_ELEMENT_SET_JSON, COMPARE_BASELINE, PAGE_ID, ROUTE_ID, SHELL_PROFILE_ID, PAGE_FRAME_ID, COMPONENT_COVERAGE_STATE, BINDING_COVERAGE_STATE, BACKEND_CHAIN_STATE, HELP_SECURITY_STATE, RESULT, BLOCKER_COUNT, VERIFY_SHELL_YN, VERIFY_COMPONENT_YN, VERIFY_BINDING_YN, VERIFY_BACKEND_YN, VERIFY_HELP_SECURITY_YN, REQUESTED_BY, REQUESTED_BY_TYPE, BLOCKER_SET_JSON, RESULT_PAYLOAD_JSON, OCCURRED_AT, ROW_VERSION, CREATED_BY, UPDATED_BY, CREATED_AT, UPDATED_AT ) VALUES ( #{verificationRunId}, #{traceId}, #{projectId}, #{scenarioFamilyId}, #{menuId}, #{guidedStateId}, #{templateLineId}, #{ownerLane}, #{targetRuntime}, #{releaseUnitId}, #{screenFamilyRuleId}, #{selectedScreenId}, #{selectedElementSetJson, typeHandler=egovframework.com.config.data.CubridClobStringTypeHandler}, #{compareBaseline}, #{pageId}, #{routeId}, #{shellProfileId}, #{pageFrameId}, #{componentCoverageState}, #{bindingCoverageState}, #{backendChainState}, #{helpSecurityState}, #{result}, #{blockerCount}, #{verifyShellYn}, #{verifyComponentYn}, #{verifyBindingYn}, #{verifyBackendYn}, #{verifyHelpSecurityYn}, #{requestedBy}, #{requestedByType}, #{blockerSetJson, typeHandler=egovframework.com.config.data.CubridClobStringTypeHandler}, #{resultPayloadJson, typeHandler=egovframework.com.config.data.CubridClobStringTypeHandler}, #{occurredAt}, 0, #{requestedBy}, #{requestedBy}, CURRENT_DATETIME, CURRENT_DATETIME )

INSERT INTO RSN_MODULE_BINDING_PREVIEW ( MODULE_BINDING_PREVIEW_ID, TRACE_ID, PROJECT_ID, SCENARIO_FAMILY_ID, SCENARIO_ID, GUIDED_STATE_ID, PAGE_ASSEMBLY_ID, TEMPLATE_LINE_ID, SCREEN_FAMILY_RULE_ID, THEME_SET_ID, INSTALLABLE_MODULE_ID, MODULE_PATTERN_FAMILY_ID, MODULE_DEPTH_PROFILE_ID, SELECTION_MODE, OPERATOR_ID, FRONTEND_IMPACT_SUMMARY, BACKEND_IMPACT_SUMMARY, DB_IMPACT_SUMMARY, CSS_IMPACT_SUMMARY, RUNTIME_PACKAGE_ATTACH_PREVIEW, ROLLBACK_PLAN_SUMMARY, BLOCKING_ISSUE_COUNT, BLOCKING_ISSUE_SET_JSON, READY_FOR_APPLY_YN, PREVIEW_PAYLOAD_JSON, ROW_VERSION, CREATED_BY, UPDATED_BY, CREATED_AT, UPDATED_AT ) VALUES ( #{moduleBindingPreviewId}, #{traceId}, #{projectId}, #{scenarioFamilyId}, #{scenarioId}, #{guidedStateId}, #{pageAssemblyId}, #{templateLineId}, #{screenFamilyRuleId}, #{themeSetId}, #{installableModuleId}, #{modulePatternFamilyId}, #{moduleDepthProfileId}, #{selectionMode}, #{operatorId}, #{frontendImpactSummary}, #{backendImpactSummary}, #{dbImpactSummary}, #{cssImpactSummary}, #{runtimePackageAttachPreview, typeHandler=egovframework.com.config.data.CubridClobStringTypeHandler}, #{rollbackPlanSummary}, #{blockingIssueCount}, #{blockingIssueSetJson, typeHandler=egovframework.com.config.data.CubridClobStringTypeHandler}, #{readyForApplyYn}, #{previewPayloadJson, typeHandler=egovframework.com.config.data.CubridClobStringTypeHandler}, 0, #{operatorId}, #{operatorId}, CURRENT_DATETIME, CURRENT_DATETIME )

INSERT INTO RSN_MODULE_BINDING_RESULT ( MODULE_BINDING_RESULT_ID, MODULE_BINDING_PREVIEW_ID, TRACE_ID, PROJECT_ID, SCENARIO_FAMILY_ID, SCENARIO_ID, GUIDED_STATE_ID, PAGE_ASSEMBLY_ID, TEMPLATE_LINE_ID, SCREEN_FAMILY_RULE_ID, THEME_SET_ID, RELEASE_UNIT_ID, RUNTIME_PACKAGE_ID, GENERATION_RUN_ID, JSON_REVISION_SET_JSON, SELECTION_APPLIED_YN, APPLIED_MODULE_SET_JSON, ATTACHED_PAGE_ASSET_SET_JSON, ATTACHED_COMPONENT_ASSET_SET_JSON, ATTACHED_BACKEND_ASSET_SET_JSON, ATTACHED_DB_ASSET_SET_JSON, RUNTIME_PACKAGE_IMPACT_SUMMARY, RELEASE_BLOCKER_DELTA_JSON, FOLLOW_UP_CHECKLIST_SUMMARY, REPAIR_NEEDED_YN, REPAIR_QUEUE_COUNT, REPAIR_SESSION_CANDIDATE_ID, COMPARE_CONTEXT_ID, PUBLISHED_ASSET_TRACE_SET_JSON, TRACE_LINK_SET_JSON, NEXT_RECOMMENDED_ACTION, ROLLBACK_ANCHOR_YN, RESULT_PAYLOAD_JSON, ROW_VERSION, CREATED_BY, UPDATED_BY, CREATED_AT, UPDATED_AT ) VALUES ( #{moduleBindingResultId}, #{moduleBindingPreviewId}, #{traceId}, #{projectId}, #{scenarioFamilyId}, #{scenarioId}, #{guidedStateId}, #{pageAssemblyId}, #{templateLineId}, #{screenFamilyRuleId}, #{themeSetId}, #{releaseUnitId}, #{runtimePackageId}, #{generationRunId}, #{jsonRevisionSetJson, typeHandler=egovframework.com.config.data.CubridClobStringTypeHandler}, #{selectionAppliedYn}, #{appliedModuleSetJson, typeHandler=egovframework.com.config.data.CubridClobStringTypeHandler}, #{attachedPageAssetSetJson, typeHandler=egovframework.com.config.data.CubridClobStringTypeHandler}, #{attachedComponentAssetSetJson, typeHandler=egovframework.com.config.data.CubridClobStringTypeHandler}, #{attachedBackendAssetSetJson, typeHandler=egovframework.com.config.data.CubridClobStringTypeHandler}, #{attachedDbAssetSetJson, typeHandler=egovframework.com.config.data.CubridClobStringTypeHandler}, #{runtimePackageImpactSummary}, #{releaseBlockerDeltaJson, typeHandler=egovframework.com.config.data.CubridClobStringTypeHandler}, #{followUpChecklistSummary}, #{repairNeededYn}, #{repairQueueCount}, #{repairSessionCandidateId}, #{compareContextId}, #{publishedAssetTraceSetJson, typeHandler=egovframework.com.config.data.CubridClobStringTypeHandler}, #{traceLinkSetJson, typeHandler=egovframework.com.config.data.CubridClobStringTypeHandler}, #{nextRecommendedAction}, #{rollbackAnchorYn}, #{resultPayloadJson, typeHandler=egovframework.com.config.data.CubridClobStringTypeHandler}, 0, #{operatorId}, #{operatorId}, CURRENT_DATETIME, CURRENT_DATETIME )
